name: ux-principles-skill
description: Practical UX, interaction-design, and visual-design principles for Claude to design, build, and review user interfaces. Seven reference files distill and cite foundational books — Norman (Design of Everyday Things), Cooper (About Face), Lidwell (Universal Principles of Design), Lupton (Thinking with Type), Buxton (Sketching User Experiences), Preece/Rogers/Sharp (Interaction Design), and Moggridge (Designing Interactions) — teaching each author's exact vocabulary, rules, and numbers rather than generic advice.
